signals.content_en: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This may affect China-origin goods exported to the U.S. and other markets due to supply chain scrutiny. General high-tech trade baseline applies for non-U.S. destinations.
signals.content_zh: 美国贸易代表办公室发起强迫劳动301调查并拟加征关税，可能影响中国出口至美国及其他市场的货物，因供应链审查。对于非美国目的地，适用一般高科技贸易基线。

checklist.desc: Prepare commercial invoice, packing list, contract, and export license slots for general electronics.
Run China export control and cryptography reviews for wireless/secure computing features.
Review supply chain for any forced labor allegations and prepare documentation to demonstrate compliance.
Ensure correct origin marking and certification to avoid transshipment or circumvention claims.

signals.content_en: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions.
signals.content_zh: 应用材料公司因非法向中国出口半导体制造设备，违反BIS出口管制和实体清单规定，同意支付2.52亿美元罚款。

checklist.desc: 确认设备ECCN编码，评估是否受EAR管制及是否需要出口许可证。
对最终用户和最终用途进行实体清单筛查，确保不涉及被禁实体。
获取并保留最终用户和最终用途声明，确保合规。
评估设备HTS编码是否受Section 301附加关税影响，并计算税率。
如设备含无线功能，确认FCC Part 15/18认证及供应商FCC ID。

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related equipment. Exporters must now demonstrate that items are not destined for military end-use or end-users on the Entity List.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部修订了对华出口半导体的许可证审查政策，加强了对先进芯片及相关设备的管控。出口商必须证明产品不会用于军事最终用途或实体清单上的最终用户。

checklist.desc: 确认产品ECCN编码，评估是否受EAR管制及许可证要求。
对最终用户和最终用途进行实体清单筛查，保留筛查记录。
获取并审核最终用户声明，确保非军事用途。
核对HTS编码，评估是否适用Section 301附加关税。
如需要，准备并提交BIS出口许可证申请。

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms. This change may affect licensing requirements for certain firearms exports.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部撤销了拜登时期的枪支规则，恢复了对民用枪支出口管制的常识性做法。此变更可能影响某些枪支的出口许可要求。

checklist.desc: 确认产品是否受EAR管辖，检查ECCN分类，并筛查实体清单和拒绝人员名单。
确认HTS编码是否涉及301条款附加关税，并计算税率影响。
获取并保留最终用户和最终用途声明，确保不涉及军事用途或受制裁实体。
如产品含无线功能，确认FCC Part 15/18认证，并保留FCC ID。

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce has expanded the Entity List to cover affiliates of listed entities. This increases the scope of restricted parties for US export controls, requiring enhanced due diligence on all parties involved in the transaction, including subsidiaries and affiliates.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部已将实体清单扩展至涵盖被列实体的关联公司。这扩大了美国出口管制限制方的范围，要求对所有交易相关方（包括子公司和关联公司）进行更严格的尽职调查。

checklist.desc: Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Run restricted party and export control screening; retain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.
Verify all transaction parties, including affiliates and subsidiaries, against the expanded Entity List to ensure no restricted parties are involved.
Collect and retain end-use and end-user statements for all controlled items, especially semiconductors, to demonstrate compliance with BIS regulations.

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce has closed a loophole that allowed foreign-owned semiconductor fabs in China to bypass export controls. This action tightens restrictions on the export of advanced semiconductor manufacturing equipment and technology to China, particularly targeting foreign-owned facilities that previously could avoid direct licensing requirements. Exporters must now ensure compliance with expanded BIS regulations, including Entity List screening and end-use checks for any semiconductor-related shipments to China.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部堵住了外国在华半导体工厂规避出口管制的漏洞。此举加强了对中国出口先进半导体制造设备和技术的限制，尤其针对此前可避开直接许可要求的外资工厂。出口商必须确保遵守扩大的BIS法规，包括对任何运往中国的半导体相关货物进行实体清单筛查和最终用途检查。

checklist.desc: Screen all parties against BIS Entity List and Unverified List; obtain end-user/end-use statements for semiconductor equipment.
Classify items under EAR (e.g., 3B001, 3B002) and verify if license required for China-bound exports.
Map HTS codes to Section 301 lists; calculate additional duties and document origin.
Confirm if consignee is a foreign-owned semiconductor fab in China; apply expanded controls.
Assess availability of license exceptions (e.g., GBS, CIV) and document justification.
Obtain signed end-use certificate for semiconductor manufacturing items.

signals.content_en: Commerce eases export controls on Syria, reducing restrictions on certain items. However, for US-bound exports, standard BIS export controls and entity list screening still apply. Ensure compliance with FCC Part 15/18 for wireless electronics and Section 301 tariff exposure.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部放宽对叙利亚的出口管制，减少对某些物品的限制。但对于出口至美国的产品，仍需遵守BIS出口管制和实体清单筛查。确保无线电子产品符合FCC Part 15/18要求，并关注Section 301关税风险。

checklist.desc: Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Run restricted party and export control screening; retain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.
